query:
WITH inserted AS (
                INSERT INTO resource_events (
                    resource_id,
                    resource_kind,
                    event_time,
                    event_type,
                    event_payload
                )
                SELECT
                    $1,
                    $2,
                    e.event_time,
                    e.event_type,
                    e.event_payload
                FROM UNNEST(
                    $3::timestamptz[],
                    $4::text[],
                    $5::jsonb[]
                ) AS e(event_time, event_type, event_payload)
                RETURNING event_id
            )
            SELECT MAX(event_id) AS "event_id!" FROM inserted
